step_rationale: EIF2AK3 (HRI/GCN2) mediates mitochondrial stress and unfolded protein response in ischemia.
mechanism: EIF2AK3 activation by mitochondrial dysfunction contributes to cardiomyocyte necrosis during myocardial ischemia.

references.title: A circular network of adenosine-mediated mitochondrial dysfunction as coregulators of acute myocardial infarction.
